data.title: Binance will list KAITO and open trading pairs
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch KAITO (KAITO) at 13:00 (UTC) on February 20, 2025, and open KAITO/BTC, KAITO/USDT, KAITO/USDC, KAITO/BNB, KAITO/FDUSD and KAITO/TRY trading pairs. In addition, users who deposit BNB into SimpleEarn products between 00:00 (UTC) on February 6, 2025 and 23:59 (UTC) on February 10, 2025 will be eligible for KAITO airdrop rewards. The airdrop tokens will be distributed to the user's spot wallet 1 hour before the start of trading. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Tether Seeks Majority Stake in South American Agribusiness Adecoagro
data.description:
Adecoagro, a leading producer of milk, rice, and renewable energy, confirmed receipt of the proposal and is currently reviewing it with financial and legal advisors.
The post Tether Seeks Majority Stake in South American Agribusiness Adecoagro appeared first on Cryptonews.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/tether-seeks-majority-stake-in-south-american-agribusiness-adecoagro/

data.title: QCP: Inflation concerns remain a focus, BTC struggles to break higher in the absence of catalysts in the short term
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News QCP posted on its channel that as tariff tensions escalate, inflation concerns remain the top concern. So far, the only confirmed blow is a 10% tariff on some Chinese goods. If a consensus is reached, the proposed 25% tariff on Canada and Mexico can be avoided, and the planned increase in steel and aluminum tariffs from 10% to 25% will take effect on March 12. However, the market has largely digested these risks. Although uncertainty remains, the stock market continues to rise and the VIX futures structure remains stable. The slow decline in the market's sideways consolidation has led to volatility sellers dominating, while long volatility positions have difficulty generating returns.
Cryptocurrencies are still under pressure, and SOL is facing the impact of $3 billion in token unlocking. Meanwhile, Argentina's latest Meme soared by $4 billion with the support of the president, and then plummeted 89%, leaving thousands of investors with huge losses.
Additionally, Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR) did not purchase any Bitcoin last week, leaving its holdings unchanged for the second time at 478,740 BTC. However, the company plans to strengthen its Bitcoin position through a private offering of $2 billion in convertible senior notes. Despite these headwinds, Bitcoin remains resilient around $95,000 after falling to $93,000, but struggles to break higher in the absence of catalysts in the near term.

data.title: Binance CEO Teng envisions a new dawn for crypto in the Trump administration
data.description:
Binance CEO Richard Teng said that the crypto ecosystem might have a fresh reset under the new Trump administration.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/binance-ceo-a-new-dawn-for-crypto/

data.title: Federal Reserve Signals Caution Amid Rising Inflation Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, the Federal Reserve has indicated a cautious approach towards further interest rate cuts due to persistent inflation. Investors are keenly observing the Federal Reserve's meeting minutes for insights on how long the current interest rates might be maintained. U.S. President Donald Trump's new fiscal policies, including deregulation, tax cuts, and potential stimulus measures, could stimulate economic growth, reducing the necessity for additional rate cuts. Additionally, tariffs and immigration policies may contribute to inflation in both the short and long term. BNP Paribas strategists noted that the Federal Reserve is comfortably awaiting clarity on the next policy steps. CME's FedWatch tool suggests a nearly 50% probability of a rate cut in June, which could be considered an aggressive expectation. Blake Gwinn, head of U.S. rates strategy at RBC Capital Markets, mentioned that the Federal Reserve might remain on hold for the rest of the year, but did not rule out the possibility of rate hikes if inflation resurges.

data.title: KAITO will open airdrop applications at 20:00 tomorrow
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Kaito AI announced that KAITO will open airdrop applications at 20:00 tomorrow (UTC+8), and the token economics will be announced before the application. KAITO trading will start at 21:00 (UTC+8).

data.title: Four wallets suspected to belong to the same entity deposited 2.119 trillion SHIB into Coinbase, earning $1.63 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to OnchainLens monitoring, 4 wallets that may belong to the same entity recently deposited 2.119 trillion SHIB to Coinbase, with a total value of approximately US$32.55 million, and realized a profit of US$1.63 million. These wallets purchased a total of US$30.91 million in SHIB from September 17, 2021 to July 19, 2024, and locked in the profits through this transfer.

data.description:
Hayden Davis, a key figure behind the Solana-based Libra memecoin, is at the center of allegations suggesting he reportedly claimed to have influence over Argentine President Javier Milei, local media outlet La Nación reported on Feb. 18. data.title: Strategy Plans $2B Stock Sale to Buy More Bitcoin
data.description:
Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) is issuing $2 billion in convertible notes to buy more Bitcoin, continuing its aggressive accumulation strategy.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/strategy-plans-2b-stock-sale-to-buy-more-bitcoin
